name: spm-runtime
description: SPM skill manager integration. Use this skill when: the user asks about installed skills, skill packages, or the skill registry; the user wants to search for, install, update, or remove skills; you cannot find an installed skill that matches the user's request and want to suggest one; the user mentions 'spm', 'skill package', or 'skill registry'. Do NOT read this skill for normal task execution — only for skill management and discovery.

_meta.goal: Make agents aware of the SPM ecosystem so they can help users discover, install, and manage skills mid-conversation. Without this, agents see skills but can't search for new ones or explain where their skills come from.
_meta.how_installed: Bundled with SPM CLI binary at assets/spm-runtime-SKILL.md. Auto-installed by 'spm bootstrap' into all detected agent skill directories via Vercel's skills CLI (npx skills add). Never published to the registry.
_meta.when_triggered: Only when user asks about skill management, the registry, or when the agent can't find a matching skill. NOT for normal task execution.
_meta.security_notes: This skill does not execute code, access the network, or modify files. It only provides instructions to the agent about how to interact with SPM.
